senses.gloss: a kind of small bowl-shaped plate for side dishes, like for sauces for meat, as well as chemistry applications

examples.text: مَا عَلِمْتُ النَّبِيَّ أَكَلَ عَلَى سُكُرُّجَةٍ قَطُّ، وَلَا خُبِزَ لَهُ مُرَقَّقٌ قَطُّ، وَلَا أَكَلَ عَلَى خِوَانٍ
examples.english: He never ate from a side-dish plate, never had crumbled bread, and never ate on the table.

senses.gloss: a weight measure used as well in cookery as in pharmacy of a bowl containing 125 grams

examples.text:
دهن الحسك
حسك مرضوض عشرة دراهم زنجبيل أربعة دراهم دهن حل أسكرجة ماء عذب خمس عشرة أسكرجة
examples.english:
Caltrop oil
Crushed caltrop ten dirham; ginger four dirham; sesame oil one cupful; fresh water fiteen cupfuls.

senses.gloss: cutting-disk of a threshing-sledge – Schneidscheibe des Dreschschlittens
socket of a door hinge – Angelpfanne einer Tür

examples.text:
طيب، وقصيد الشيخ مليجي وإبرهيم،
 وخطبة الشيخ سكرجة والشيخ كليم،
 ليه ما طبعتوهم، ولا أخذوا فلوس،
 في أجرة الشمعة، وتصليح الفَنوس؟
examples.english:
Well, and the qasida of Sheykh Malīgī and ʔIbrahīm,
and the speech of Sheykh Hinge-Socket and the speech of Sheykh Carpet,
why have you not printed them, and they received naught to redeem
dedicated brooding by the candle, screwing the lamplet?

etymology.text: From Middle Persian corresponding to Classical Persian سکرچه (sukarrača). سکرجه (sokarraja), see Persian سکوره (sokure).
